print_profile.preview_note: The main portal preview should mimic 58mm thermal paper. Text is ASCII/native printer text. QR codes use the printer QR command. Only image cards should be rasterized.

print_content.vote_instructions: Detach one vote token and pass it face down.

raster_policy.preferred_raster_location: ESP32 only when the source is already image-like; app-side if AI/image processing is needed first

qr_card_text: Scan this to submit the winning story.
fallback_round_title: A new turn of the voyage
fallback_round_story: Jim and Julia notice a strange invitation slipped under their cabin door.
patience_card_text: Please be patient while cards are being generated. I'll let you know when they are here.
ready_notice_card_text: Your cards are ready, thank you for your patience.
story_submission_apology_text: Sorry, but you should first submit the story.
fallback_persona_image_prompt: Centered front-facing black ink portrait of {name}, an average {age}-year-old {gender}, simple white background, thermal printer friendly, high contrast, clean silhouette, no text, no border, no frame.
desire_templates: Secret desire: be invited into a risky plan.
Secret desire: have someone defend your choice.
Secret desire: leave the scene with a new promise.
Secret desire: make Jim or Julia change their mind.

openai.system_prompt: You write concise, playable, thermal-printer-friendly cards for a live storytelling game on 58mm paper. Keep output plain ASCII-style text. Do not use Markdown tables, emoji, decorative Unicode, or layouts that require proportional fonts.

scenario_steps.title: Welcome to a game of Love Adventure
scenario_steps.text:
Welcome to a game of

Select the number of players from the side switch and hit START/NEXT.
scenario_steps.print_body:
Welcome to a game of

Select the number of players from the side switch and hit START/NEXT.

scenario_steps.title: Instructions
scenario_steps.text:
Don't Worry If you haven't played this game. Throughout the game, I, the game unit AI will instruct you.
First, let's find our first CAPTAIN. The first Captain is the player who has not been in a relationship for the longest. If you are all in relationships, then the player in the shortest relationship is the Captain. When you find the Captain, pass me to them.
scenario_steps.print_body:
Don't Worry If you haven't played this game. Throughout the game, I, the game unit AI will instruct you.
First, let's find our first CAPTAIN. The first Captain is the player who has not been in a relationship for the longest. If you are all in relationships, then the player in the shortest relationship is the Captain. When you find the Captain, pass me to them.

scenario_steps.title: Story
scenario_steps.text: Read this to all: In this game, you will explore the adventures of Jim and Julia, a couple on a seven-day-long ship ride. Detach this card, then press START/NEXT to print their Persona Cards. Make sure you detach the first card before pressing the button.
scenario_steps.print_body: Read this to all: In this game, you will explore the adventures of Jim and Julia, a couple on a seven-day-long ship ride. Detach this card, then press START/NEXT to print their Persona Cards. Make sure you detach the first card before pressing the button.

scenario_steps.title: Jim
scenario_steps.text: Jim

scenario_steps.title: Julia
scenario_steps.text: Julia

scenario_steps.title: First Round Setup
scenario_steps.text: Put Jim and Julia in the middle. The Captain presses the button. They will have the first card. They will fold the card from the indicated line and then put the card in front of them, face side up. Then they pass the game unit to the player to their left, who will do the same. When every player has one card folded in front of them, return the unit to the captain.
scenario_steps.print_body: Put Jim and Julia in the middle. The Captain presses the button. They will have the first card. They will fold the card from the indicated line and then put the card in front of them, face side up. Then they pass the game unit to the player to their left, who will do the same. When every player has one card folded in front of them, return the unit to the captain.

scenario_steps.title: Persona Cards
scenario_steps.text: Print N prepared persona cards based on the number of players. Add names to the persona list. Include a perforated line and desires.

scenario_steps.title: A night at the bar
scenario_steps.text: Jim and Julia are sitting at the bar. They have been wanting to do this for a long while, and today feels like the right time. [persona list] are other passengers of the ship, present at the bar. Jim and Julia are discussing how fun the night would be if one other person could join them...
scenario_steps.print_body: Jim and Julia are sitting at the bar. They have been wanting to do this for a long while, and today feels like the right time. [persona list] are other passengers of the ship, present at the bar. Jim and Julia are discussing how fun the night would be if one other person could join them...

scenario_steps.title: Tell stories
scenario_steps.text: Each player tells the story of the NIGHT if their card persona would join Jim and Julia. How do they meet? What happens next? After 1 minute, starting with the Captain, every player has 1-2 minutes to tell their stories. After this round of storytelling, press the button again.
scenario_steps.print_body: Each player tells the story of the NIGHT if their card persona would join Jim and Julia. How do they meet? What happens next? After 1 minute, starting with the Captain, every player has 1-2 minutes to tell their stories. After this round of storytelling, press the button again.

scenario_steps.title: Now its time vote!
scenario_steps.text: First print out the ballots.

scenario_steps.title: Vote Papers
scenario_steps.text: Print N ballots.

scenario_steps.title: Voting instructions
scenario_steps.text: Now use the voting papers to vote for the story that you liked. Detach the number (C being Captain and so on) face it down and pass it to the captain. You cannot vote for yourself. In case of a tie, the Captain will have the final vote.
scenario_steps.print_body: Now use the voting papers to vote for the story that you liked. Detach the number (C being Captain and so on) face it down and pass it to the captain. You cannot vote for yourself. In case of a tie, the Captain will have the final vote.

scenario_steps.title: Story Portal
scenario_steps.text: Now let me know how the night went.
scenario_steps.print_body: Now let me know how the night went.
scenario_steps.print_footer: Take this card to the round winner. They are the new Captain, and they score ONE point. They should scan the card and fill out the form. While they are doing this, it is time to explain one new rule. There are desires written on each persona card. They are folded downward so other players cannot read them. Your goal is to make your cards' desires come true. However, you cannot include them in your stories; you have to play the game in a way to realize their desires through either other players' stories or AI stories. When that desire is achieved, you win points as indicated on the card.

scenario_steps.title: Submission gate
scenario_steps.text: START/NEXT works only when the new captain submits.

scenario_steps.title: Captain setup
scenario_steps.text: The New Captain takes hold of the box and determines the three factors: AGE, QUEERNESS, and DIVERSITY. This will affect the next cards that come out of the game unit. Then, they press the START/NEXT button. They will have the first card. They will fold the card from the indicated line and then put the card in front of them, face side up. Then they pass the game unit to the player to their left, who will do the same. When every player has one card folded in front of them, return the unit to the captain.

scenario_steps.title: Persona Cards
scenario_steps.text: Print N persona cards based on Age, Queerness, and Diversity. Add names to the persona list. Include a perforated line and desires.

scenario_steps.title: Generated title
scenario_steps.text: [Title based on prompt response]

scenario_steps.title: Generated story
scenario_steps.text: [Story based on prompt response]

scenario_steps.title: Vote Papers
scenario_steps.text: Print N vote papers: C, 2, 3, 4, and so on.

scenario_steps.title: Voting instructions
scenario_steps.text: Now use the voting papers to vote for the story that you liked. Detach the number, with C being Captain and so on, face it down and pass it to the captain. You cannot vote for yourself. In case of a tie, the Captain will have the final vote.

scenario_steps.title: Story Portal
scenario_steps.text: QR code that links to the unique story portal.

scenario_steps.title: Same as round 2
scenario_steps.text: Same as round 2.

scenario_steps.title: Same as round 2
scenario_steps.text: Same as round 2.

prompts.persona_generation: Generate {count} short persona cards for a thermal printer. Current controls: AGE={age}/100, QUEERNESS={queerness}/100, DIVERSITY={diversity}/100. Each card should be numbered and include: name, age cue, pronouns or sexuality cue, 2-3 personality hashtags, and one secret desire after the fold line. Keep the whole output compact.
prompts.persona_single_generation: Generate persona card {index} of {count} for a live thermal-printer storytelling game. Persona profile: {persona_profile}. If persona_profile is average, keep everything average and grounded. If persona_profile is controls, use the current controls: AGE={age}/100, QUEERNESS={queerness}/100, DIVERSITY={diversity}/100. Do not use these names: {avoid_names}. Return exactly one JSON object with keys: name, age, sexuality, gender, hashtags, desire, image_prompt. The name must be unique and easy to print. Use age as a number. hashtags must be 2-4 short strings. desire must be one compact secret desire, without adding extra rules. image_prompt must describe a centered front-facing black ink portrait on a pure white background, high contrast, thermal-printer friendly, no text, no border, no frame.
prompts.round_title: Create one short playable round title for Jim and Julia on a seven-day ship ride. Current controls: AGE={age}/100, QUEERNESS={queerness}/100, DIVERSITY={diversity}/100. Persona list: {persona_list}. Return only the title.
prompts.round_story: Create one concise story setup for Jim, Julia, and these passengers: {persona_list}. Current controls: AGE={age}/100, QUEERNESS={queerness}/100, DIVERSITY={diversity}/100. End with a clear invitation for players to tell stories. Keep it short enough for a thermal printer.
prompts.thermal_style: Write for 58mm thermal paper. Keep lines short, paragraphs compact, and output plain text. Avoid markdown tables, decorative Unicode, long dashes, emoji, or layout that depends on proportional fonts.

instructions.scenario_progression: The START/NEXT button advances one entry in scenario_steps. Scenarios.xlsx is reference only and is not read by the app.
instructions.printer_unit: The ESP32 calls /api/device/next, receives one card as JSON, and prints it without a computer connection.
instructions.render: Set the Render environment variable GAME_CONFIG_PATH only if you want to use a different config file path.
